features: Dual side-by-side imagers: 4MP visible starlight imager + uncooled vanadium-oxide thermal microbolometer
Black housing, ~18mm athermal thermal lens (model code Z30B18Q)
30x optical / 12x digital zoom on visible imager
360 deg continuous pan, 292 deg tilt range
Intelligent Video Analytics (IVA) on the edge with Intelligent Tracking and metadata fusion
Integrated window wiper, heater and defroster for extreme weather
Object detection up to ~800 m (DRI criteria)
16GB internal EMMC local storage, iSCSI/ANR recording

frigate.notes: Bosch official RTSP scheme: /?inst=1 main, /?inst=2 sub (per Bosch 'RTSP usage with Bosch Video IP Devices'). Default admin user is 'service' (no factory default password — set one first). ONVIF Profile S/G (T/M on INTEOX). Not individually bench-tested.

home_assistant.notes: Generic ONVIF integration; Bosch CPP cameras are ONVIF Profile S/G compliant. Use the 'service' account.

blue_iris.notes: Bosch — use the ONVIF/RTSP (or 'Bosch') profile; default admin user is 'service'.
